description:
A modern and secure instant messaging for people, business and healthcare


[Feature] Chat Window: Added unread indicators for tabs scrolled out of view
[Feature] Emoji: Improved emoji browser with search and zoom on hover
[Feature] GIF: Support for incoming KLIPY rendering
[Feature] Media: Improved media upload UI with separate area for media vs text
[Feature] Message Edit: Support for formatting within message edit
[Feature] Pro: Update Trillian Pro purchase flow and management
[Feature] Settings: Separated settings for emoji reactions with private and channels
[Feature] Skin: Built-in support for rounded corners on scrollbars
[Fixed] Blast Messages: Fixed issue where media blast messages may not echo in current opened windows
[Fixed] Channel: Editing a message in a channel may not disable members list correctly
[Fixed] Chat Window: New built-in find bar for quick searching within the chat window
[Fixed] Chat Window: Single chat windows do not have a help button attached
[Fixed] Chat Window: Some messages may contain extra formatting text after editing
[Fixed] Chat Window: Some messages may contain extra formatting text during language changing
[Fixed] Contact List: Fixed issue with empty Metacontacts and search
[Fixed] Emoji: Fixed issue where emoji may not show in larger size after changing between bubble and simple view
[Fixed] Emoji: Recent emoji may save more than the max recent limit and not cap correctly
[Fixed] Media: Fixed issue where some video thumbnails may not generate correctly when rotated
[Fixed] Media: Fixed issue where media may be incorrectly allowed to be added while edit is disabled
[Fixed] Media: Improved diagnostic logging for video thumbnail generation
[Fixed] Media: Now shows media as links when the links are incorrect
[Fixed] Message Edit: Fixed issue where edited message may not show for opened chat windows while offline
[Fixed] Message Edit: Fixed issue with menu incorrectly showing edit option when not allowed for particular messages
[Fixed] Message Edit: Hides correctly when editing a message with the same value
[Fixed] Message Reactions: Fixed issue where reactions may not update when offline
[Fixed] Message Reactions: Reactions may move when mousing over even if reaction support is not allowed
[Fixed] Notifications: Incoming silent messages may incorrectly generate sounds and notifications
[Fixed] Settings: Contact list setting for layout not abiding by policy correctly
[Fixed] Settings: Updating notification settings from tray icon did not update in settings
[Fixed] Signin: Incorrectly not showing bad password in some situations
